doc_title: Waters of the United States — EPA/Army Corps Final Rule
label: partial
reason: The Federal Register citation is real but the document blends the original 2023 WOTUS rule language with post-Sackett judicial standards and includes editorially invented headings not found in the actual regulatory text.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The 88 Fed. Reg. 3004 (Jan. 18, 2023) WOTUS final rule citation is real, but the document conflates the pre-Sackett rule with post-Sackett conforming amendments in a legally imprecise way, the "continuous surface connection" standard is drawn from Sackett's majority opinion rather than the original rule text, and the "No Hobby-Landowner Exemption" framing appears editorially invented rather than drawn from any official regulatory provision.
